---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the project
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include screenshots or error messages if applicable.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version:** [e.g., 18.19.0, 20.10.0]
- **Deployment:** [Local, Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages]

## Console Errors
If there are any console errors, please paste them here:

```
Paste console errors here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical - blocks functionality completely
- [ ] High - significantly impacts user experience
- [ ] Medium - minor but noticeable issue
- [ ] Low - cosmetic or trivial issue
